entities.description: f1 score is an evaluation metric used to measure the performance of text span answers by comparing extracted answers to ground truth
token level f1 score is a specific type of f1 score used for questions requiring text span answers
p represents precision  calculated as the intersection of extracted and ground truth tokens divided by the extracted tokens
r represents recall  calculated as the intersection of extracted and ground truth tokens divided by the ground truth tokens
f1 is the harmonic mean of precision  p  and recall  r   calculated using the formula 2   p   r    p   r
equation  19  defines the calculation for the f1 score based on precision and recall

relations.description: the token level f1 score is a specific application of the f1 score for text span answers
equation  19  provides the mathematical formula for calculating the f1 score
p  precision  is a component used in the calculation of the f1 score
r  recall  is a component used in the calculation of the f1 score
